articles.title: Is Ethereum Undervalued, or Polkadot Overvalued?
articles.description: BeInCrypto dives into current platform analytics to compare the DOT versus ETH price and their network usage. Estimation of future production capacity drives price. However, we can begin to understand the valuation of the two ecosystems and why one may be way undervalued or overvalued compared to the other. Is Polkadot really an Ethereum killer? … Continued
